---

## ✨ Feature Request

### 📝 Summary

<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like. -->

### 🤔 Problem / Motivation

<!-- Is your feature request related to a problem? Describe it. -->

**As a** [user/developer/contributor],
**I want to** [do something],
**So that** [benefit/goal].

### 💡 Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the solution you'd like. -->

### 🔄 Alternatives Considered

<!-- Any alternative solutions or features you've considered. -->

### 🤖 Applicable Agents

<!-- Which agents would benefit from this feature? -->

- [ ] All agents
- [ ] Agent 01 - Customer Support
- [ ] Agent 02 - Web Search
- [ ] Agent 03 - Chatbot Simulation
- [ ] Agent 04 - AI Prompt Generator
- [ ] Agent 05 - Vibe Matcher
- [ ] Agent 06 - Lead Generation
- [ ] Agent 07 - Instagram DM Bot
- [ ] Agent 08 - AutoGen Web Info
- [ ] Agent 09 - AI Co-Browser
- [ ] Agent 10 - OpenClaw
- [ ] Other: <!-- Specify -->

### 🎨 UI/UX Mockups

<!-- If applicable, add mockups, wireframes, or diagrams. -->

### 📊 Success Criteria

<!-- How will we know this feature is successful? -->

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

### 🔗 Additional Context

<!-- Any other context, screenshots, or references. -->

### 🏷️ Priority Suggestion

<!-- How important is this feature to you? -->

- [ ] 🔴 Critical - Blocking my use case
- [ ] 🟠 High - Important for productivity
- [ ] 🟡 Medium - Would be nice to have
- [ ] 🟢 Low - Minor improvement

### ✔️ Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues for duplicates
- [ ] I have clearly described the problem and solution
- [ ] I am willing to help implement this feature
